input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the ams must measure the temperatures of critical points of the accumulator

EV.7.5.1 The AMS must measure the temperatures of critical points of the Accumulator

final_answer: The AMS must measure the temperatures of critical points of the Accumulator
